# Q5 — Cross-asset transfer matrix

*The Liu–Patton–Sheppard analog for models: where the HAR family stays in / leaves the 90% MCS (QLIKE) across asset classes. Generated by `scripts/build_transfer_matrix.py` from the committed per-class results.*


## A. Verdict by class × horizon

Verdict per the pre-registration: **DOMINATES** = HAR family in the MCS and single-best; **competitive** = HAR in MCS but a non-HAR ties/leads for some instruments; **DEGRADE** = HAR family displaced as single-best (DM-significant) or excluded from the MCS.

| Asset class | Track | h = 1 | h = 5 | h = 22 |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Equities (8) | exploratory | DOMINATES (8/8) · best LogHAR (7/8) [MZ-best] | DOMINATES (8/8) · best LogHAR (8/8) [MZ-best] | DOMINATES (8/8) · best LogHAR (8/8) [MZ-best] |
| Crypto — 4 coins | exploratory | DOMINATES (4/4) · best LogHAR [min avg-rank] | DOMINATES (4/4) · best LogHAR [min avg-rank] | DOMINATES (4/4) · best LogHAR [min avg-rank] |
| Crypto — 22 coins | confirmatory | DOMINATES 19/22 · competitive: FTT→RW · competitive: LUNA→RW · competitive: XRP→AR1Log · best LogHAR-CJ (12/22) | DOMINATES 19/22 · competitive: DOGE→EWMA · competitive: FTT→AR1Log · competitive: LUNA→AR1Log · best LogHAR-CJ (13/22) | DOMINATES 18/22 · competitive: DOGE→EWMA · competitive: FTT→HistMean · competitive: LUNA→HistMean · competitive: SOL→GBRT · best LogHAR-CJ (10/22) |
| Futures — rates (FV/TY) | confirmatory | DOMINATES (2/2) · best LogHAR-CJ (2/2) | DOMINATES (2/2) · best LogHAR-CJ (2/2) | DOMINATES (2/2) · best LogHAR-CJ (2/2) |
| Futures — commodity (8) | confirmatory | DOMINATES 7/8 · competitive: S→GBRT · best LogHAR-CJ (4/8) | DOMINATES (8/8) · best LogHAR-CJ (5/8) | DOMINATES 7/8 · DEGRADE: GC→EWMA · best LogHAR-CJ (3/8) · HAR-fam MCS 7/8 |
| Futures — equity-index (ES/NQ) | confirmatory | DOMINATES (2/2) · best LogSHAR (2/2) | DOMINATES (2/2) · best LogSHAR (2/2) | DOMINATES (2/2) · best LogSHAR (2/2) |
| Futures — fx (EU) | confirmatory | DOMINATES (1/1) · best LogHAR-CJ (1/1) | DOMINATES (1/1) · best LogHAR-CJ (1/1) | DOMINATES (1/1) · best LogHAR-CJ (1/1) |
| Futures — all (13) | confirmatory | DOMINATES 12/13 · competitive: S→GBRT · best LogHAR-CJ (7/13) | DOMINATES (13/13) · best LogHAR-CJ (8/13) | DOMINATES 12/13 · DEGRADE: GC→EWMA · best LogHAR-CJ (6/13) · HAR-fam MCS 12/13 |

## B. Refinement transfer — does the equity-tuned refinement carry over?

Count of instruments where the refinement **DM-beats LogHAR** (α = 0.05), per class.

| Asset class | Refinement | h = 1 | h = 5 | h = 22 |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Equities (8) | HARQ vs LogHAR | n/a | n/a | n/a |
| Equities (8) | LogSHAR vs LogHAR | 6/8 | 5/8 | 5/8 |
| Crypto — 4 coins | HARQ vs LogHAR | 1 (vs HAR) | 3 (vs HAR) | 2 (vs HAR) |
| Crypto — 4 coins | LogSHAR vs LogHAR | n/a | n/a | n/a |
| Crypto — 22 coins | HARQ vs LogHAR | 0/22 | 0/22 | 0/22 |
| Crypto — 22 coins | LogSHAR vs LogHAR | 0/22 | 3/22 | 3/22 |
| Futures — rates (FV/TY) | HARQ vs LogHAR | 0/2 | 0/2 | 0/2 |
| Futures — rates (FV/TY) | LogSHAR vs LogHAR | 2/2 | 2/2 | 1/2 |
| Futures — commodity (8) | HARQ vs LogHAR | 0/8 | 0/8 | 0/8 |
| Futures — commodity (8) | LogSHAR vs LogHAR | 3/8 | 2/8 | 3/8 |
| Futures — equity-index (ES/NQ) | HARQ vs LogHAR | 0/2 | 0/2 | 0/2 |
| Futures — equity-index (ES/NQ) | LogSHAR vs LogHAR | 2/2 | 2/2 | 1/2 |
| Futures — fx (EU) | HARQ vs LogHAR | 0/1 | 0/1 | 0/1 |
| Futures — fx (EU) | LogSHAR vs LogHAR | 0/1 | 0/1 | 1/1 |
| Futures — all (13) | HARQ vs LogHAR | 0/13 | 0/13 | 0/13 |
| Futures — all (13) | LogSHAR vs LogHAR | 7/13 | 6/13 | 6/13 |
